allow: PowerShell(try { $f = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Frontend: HTTP $\($f.StatusCode\) — DotField live" } catch { Write-Host "Frontend ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($g = \(Get-Command gemini -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($g\) { "gemini CLI: $\($g.Source\)" } else { "gemini CLI: NOT FOUND" }; "GEMINI_API_KEY set: $\([bool]$env:GEMINI_API_KEY\)"; "GOOGLE_API_KEY set: $\([bool]$env:GOOGLE_API_KEY\)")
PowerShell(cd frontend; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 40; "tsc exit: $LASTEXITCODE")
